archetypes.name: semantic evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: semantic signal changes while layer context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: layer boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: layer handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: agents regression harness
archetypes.trigger: agents behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: product operator packet
archetypes.trigger: product output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
